home.heroTitle: Explore the World, One Adventure at a Time
home.heroSubtitle: Professional tour services for travelers worldwide

meta.homeDesc: ToursForFun (Ctrip) offers group tours, small groups, custom trips and cruises across Americas, Europe, Asia and more.
meta.toursDesc: Browse all available tours, filter by type, and find the perfect itinerary for your next trip.
meta.aboutDesc: Learn about GlobalTours — our team, our mission, and our commitment to making travel unforgettable.

about.title: About Us
about.mission: We're dedicated to delivering professional, caring travel experiences for global travelers — making every journey an unforgettable chapter of life. With deep roots in the North American tour market and bilingual service, we make every trip worry-free.
about.feature1Desc: Our licensed guides know local culture and history inside out, providing bilingual service every step of the way.
about.feature2Desc: Select tours offer instant confirmation so you can lock in your itinerary without the wait and plan with confidence.
about.feature3Desc: From North America to Europe and the Asia Pacific, we cover the world's most sought-after destinations in one place.

agent.title: Agent Portal
agent.accessDeniedDesc: This page is for authorized travel agents only. Contact your account manager to request agent access.
agent.step1: Browse tours and add to cart as normal
agent.step2: Enter your client's name and contact in the checkout notes
agent.step3: Forward the confirmation email to your client after payment

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.emptyHint: Not sure where to go? Try our homepage recommendations
bookings.errorLoading: Failed to load orders. Please try again later.

orderDetails.title: Order Details
orderDetails.cancelledNotice: This order has been cancelled. Contact customer service if you need help with the cancellation or refund.
orderDetails.needHelpText: Please give customer service your order number {order} so we can locate your booking quickly.
orderDetails.loadError: We couldn't load this order from Shopify. Please try again shortly.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.identityNote: Your sign-in, name, and phone are securely managed by Clerk. Your verified email connects this account to matching Shopify orders.
profile.emailHint: Your verified sign-in email identifies which Shopify orders belong to you and cannot be edited here.
profile.phoneHint: Used by customer service when they need to contact you about a booking.
profile.missingName: Enter at least a first or last name.
profile.saveError: Profile could not be saved. Please try again.
profile.linkedAccount: Orders are matched securely using your verified sign-in email.
profile.newAccount: No Shopify customer existed yet. Saving creates one for future bookings.
profile.shopifyUnavailable: Shopify customer information is temporarily unavailable.
profile.noAddress: No billing address has been saved in Shopify yet.
profile.addressHint: Billing addresses come from Shopify checkout and are shown here for reference.
profile.dataConnectionText: Clerk manages login and editable personal information. Shopify remains the source for orders, booking status, items, and totals.
profile.piiNotice: This store's Shopify app does not currently have protected customer-data access, so names, phone numbers, and addresses are not read from or written to Shopify.

common.error: Something went wrong, please try again

calendar.selectDatePrompt: Please select a departure date from the calendar

tourDetail.insuranceReminderBody: We strongly recommend travel insurance (accident and cancellation coverage) for your trip.
tourDetail.itineraryDisclaimer: Itinerary order may change based on departure date and local conditions. Final arrangements follow the guide on the tour day.
tourDetail.calendarHintPrice: Prices below are per-person lowest room rates for that date.
tourDetail.calendarHintSelect: Select a date, then choose room occupancy in the booking panel.
tourDetail.childRateUnavailable: Child rate unavailable for this date
tourDetail.optionalAddonsHint: Selected priced add-ons update the estimate.
tourDetail.addonNeedTravelers: Add eligible travelers to select this add-on.
tourDetail.selectDateAndRoom: Select a date and room type to continue.
tourDetail.finalPriceNote: Final price is confirmed after booking review.
tourDetail.optionalAddonsFeesNote: Optional add-ons are available in the booking panel above, where priced add-ons update the estimate and request-only add-ons are saved with your booking details.
tourDetail.step1Desc: Pick a departure date, room occupancy, and traveler counts, then book.
tourDetail.step2Desc: Verify trip details and traveler information before payment.
tourDetail.step3Desc: Complete payment with your preferred method.
tourDetail.step4Desc: You will receive confirmation once the booking is processed.
